name: claude-company-of-one
description: Company of One workflows for solo builders across Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Agent pipelines, memory hooks, and reusable workflows for a solo engineering practice
interface.longDescription: Company of One packages the repo's shared agents, commands, rules, templates, skills, and session-memory hooks so the same operating model can run under Claude Code and Codex.
defaultPrompt: Review this task, size it, and run the right Company of One pipeline
Use the shared agent setup to plan, implement, test, and review a change
Load saved project memory and resume the active pipeline state
